skills.description: Places a 30 Increase C DMG buff and a 50 Increase ATK buff on this Champion for 3 turns then grants an Extra Turn

skills.name: Assassin of Kings [P]
skills.description: Whenever this Champion kills an enemy decreases the cooldown of the Crown Breaker skill by 1 turn

skills.name: Blade Combo
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times Has a 30 chance of placing a 25 Weaken debuff for 2 turns

skills.name: Blade Strike
skills.description:
Attacks 1 enemy 4 times Each hit increases this Champions Turn Meter by 5 

Also places a 30 Increase SPD buff on all allies for 2 turns

skills.name: Blade Spin
skills.description:
Attacks 1 enemy 4 times Before attacking places a 50 Increase ATK buff on this Champion for 2 turns 

The first and the second hit each have a 75 chance of placing a Leech debuff for 2 turns 

The third and the fourth hit each have a 75 chance of placing a 50 Decrease ATK debuff for 2 turns

skills.name: Zinogre Essence [P]
skills.description:
Passive Effect

Increases the damage this Champion deals by 1 for every 1 of HP lost stacks up to 50 This increased damage doubles if a target is under a Decrease DEF debuff

Active Effect

Prevents this Champions death and keeps them alive on 1 HP when hit by a fatal hit

If this skill prevents this Champions death heals them by 50 of their MAX HP

Will not prevent this Champions death if they are under a Heal Reduction debuff

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally Speed in Dungeons by 30%
